race.comment: PRINCING (2) switches to synthetic for the first time having won over 1400m at Geelong two starts ago, okay last time at Mornington in tougher grade. This suits nicely from an ideal draw and Stackhouse should give him every chance. DANCING DOLLY (11) has been in the market at her last couple of runs but failed to threaten, the latest effort a modest fifth at Ballarat over 1500m. Don't mind her switching to synthetic for the first time, look for an improved run. EASY DUN (3) can mix his form, winning well two back at Bendigo before a solid effort at Swan Hill. He's right up to this class and should be finishing hard. SAVAMOON (8) could be going better but does like synthetic tracks and that might be what he's looking for.
